2eaad.content:
## Commands

- Use `uv run zhar set-status <id> <status>` to move nodes through valid lifecycle states.
- Use `uv run zhar remove <id>` only for incorrect or intentionally transient records.
- Use `uv run zhar prune ...` with filters and preferably `--dry-run` first when reconciling many unexpected nodes.

## Development Context

When developing zhar inside this repository, prefer `uv run zhar` so the CLI reflects the current workspace source tree rather than an older installed entrypoint.

## Constraint

Prefer status transitions over deletion whenever the node should remain part of project history.

353ca.summary: Relation expansion is currently limited to component_rel adjacency and depends on shared component identity for broader traversal
353ca.content:
## Context

Recent export/show relation-depth work changed the effective architecture semantics of architecture_context, not just CLI file history.

## Current rule

Relation expansion currently traverses only architecture_context/component_rel nodes through shared from_component / to_component endpoints.

## Constraint

Broader traversal across other node types requires a shared component identity in their metadata. Without that anchor, relation expansion cannot safely connect non-relation nodes into the same component neighborhood.

## Implication

Changes to relation traversal behavior should be recorded in architecture_context first, with code_history used only as supplemental file-level breadcrumbing.
